scripts.test:integration: NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_FIREBASE_EMULATORS=1 USE_FIREBASE_EMULATORS=1 NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=${NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID:-demo-jrm} NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=${NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET:-demo-jrm.appspot.com} NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_API_KEY=${NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_API_KEY:-fake-api-key} NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=${NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN:-demo-jrm.firebaseapp.com} NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=${NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID:-0} NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_APP_ID=${NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_APP_ID:-demo} FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 FIREBASE_STORAGE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9199 CLIENT_ACCESS_SECRET=${CLIENT_ACCESS_SECRET:-test-client-access-secret} firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,storage --project demo-jrm "jest -c jest.integration.config.js --runInBand --detectOpenHandles"

scripts.test:e2e: NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_FIREBASE_EMULATORS=1 USE_FIREBASE_EMULATORS=1 NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=${NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID:-demo-jrm} NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=${NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET:-demo-jrm.appspot.com} NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_API_KEY=${NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_API_KEY:-fake-api-key} NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=${NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN:-demo-jrm.firebaseapp.com} NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=${NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID:-0} NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_APP_ID=${NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_APP_ID:-demo} FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 FIREBASE_STORAGE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9199 CLIENT_ACCESS_SECRET=${CLIENT_ACCESS_SECRET:-test-client-access-secret} firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,storage --project demo-jrm "playwright test"
scripts.test:all: npm run typecheck && npm run test:guardrails && npm test -- --runInBand && npm run test:rules && npm run test:integration && npm run test:e2e
scripts.test:integration:coverage: NEXT_PUBLIC_USE_FIREBASE_EMULATORS=1 USE_FIREBASE_EMULATORS=1 NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID=${NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_PROJECT_ID:-demo-jrm} NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET=${NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_STORAGE_BUCKET:-demo-jrm.appspot.com} NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_API_KEY=${NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_API_KEY:-fake-api-key} NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN=${NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_AUTH_DOMAIN:-demo-jrm.firebaseapp.com} NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID=${NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_MESSAGING_SENDER_ID:-0} NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_APP_ID=${NEXT_PUBLIC_FIREBASE_APP_ID:-demo} FIRESTORE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:8080 FIREBASE_AUTH_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9099 FIREBASE_STORAGE_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1:9199 CLIENT_ACCESS_SECRET=${CLIENT_ACCESS_SECRET:-test-client-access-secret} firebase emulators:exec --only auth,firestore,storage --project demo-jrm "jest -c jest.integration.config.js --runInBand --detectOpenHandles --coverage"
